title: A New Office and a New Language
article_text: I have a new office with a big window and a light on the desk. There are several letters on the table for me to answer. I remember the deal with my friend to share the work. We sit in the office and decide to learn a new language together. The value of this language is real for our jobs. We force ourselves to stay with the plan every day. I record my voice to check my progress bit by bit. My friend does not mind the hard work because he sees a good figure in the future. We stop for water soon after a long study session. The company allows us to develop our skills in the office.

sentences.en: I have a new office with a big window and a light on the desk.
sentences.zh: 我有一个新办公室，里面有一扇大窗户和桌上的一盏灯。

sentences.en: There are several letters on the table for me to answer.
sentences.zh: 桌上有几封信要我来回复。

words.eng_def: more than two but not many
a written message or a character in writing
to say or write something as a reply

sentences.en: I remember the deal with my friend to share the work.
sentences.zh: 我记得和朋友的约定，要分担工作。

words.eng_def: to keep something in your mind
to use or have something with another person

sentences.en: We sit in the office and decide to learn a new language together.
sentences.zh: 我们坐在办公室里，决定一起学习一门新语言。

words.eng_def: to be in a position with your bottom on a chair or the ground
to choose to do something after thinking
words people use to speak or write

sentences.en: The value of this language is real for our jobs.
sentences.zh: 这门语言的价值对我们的工作来说是真实的。

words.eng_def: how much something is worth or how important it is

sentences.en: We force ourselves to stay with the plan every day.
sentences.zh: 我们强迫自己每天坚持这个计划。

words.eng_def: to continue in a place or state

sentences.en: I record my voice to check my progress bit by bit.
sentences.zh: 我录下自己的声音来一点点检查进步。

words.eng_def: to store sound or information for later use

sentences.en: My friend does not mind the hard work because he sees a good figure in the future.
sentences.zh: 我的朋友不介意辛苦，因为他看到未来有好的前景。

words.eng_def: a number, a person, or a shape

sentences.en: We stop for water soon after a long study session.
sentences.zh: 在长时间学习后，我们很快停下来喝水。

words.eng_def: to not continue moving or doing something
a clear liquid that people drink

sentences.en: The company allows us to develop our skills in the office.
sentences.zh: 公司允许我们在办公室发展技能。

words.eng_def: to grow or make something better

vocabulary.eng_def: to be bothered by something
vocabulary.example: I do not mind the noise.

vocabulary.eng_def: how much something is worth
vocabulary.example: The value of this book is high.

quiz.question_en: Which word means 'to choose to do something after thinking'?

quiz.question_cn: ‘I do not ______ the noise.’ 意思是‘我不介意噪音。’ 空格应填什么？
quiz.question_en: Which word fits in: 'I do not ______ the noise.'?
Which word means 'how much something is worth'?

quiz.question_cn: ‘We ______ our voice.’ 意思是‘我们录下声音。’ 空格应填什么？
quiz.question_en: Which word fits in: 'We ______ our voice.'?

quiz.question_cn: 哪个词的意思是‘真实的’？

image_prompts: A bright modern office with a large window and a desk lamp on a wooden desk.
A table with several envelopes and letters, and a person writing with a pen.
Two friends shaking hands in an office, with a document on the table.
Two people sitting at a desk with books and a chalkboard showing language symbols.
A magnifying glass over a document with the word 'VALUE' highlighted.
A person pushing a heavy stone with effort, representing forcing oneself.
A person speaking into a smartphone to record voice, with small progress notes.
A person looking at a chart with a rising line figure, smiling.
Two people taking a break with glasses of water after studying.
A company building with a sign 'ALLOW' and people growing plants in an office.
